mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookmarks (id, user_id, place_id) VALUES (UUID(), #{userId}, #{placeId})
mapper.select: SELECT b.place_id, p.name, p.category, p.address, p.image_url, p.latitude, p.longitude FROM bookmarks b JOIN places p ON b.place_id = p.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_active = 1 ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
